- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
	- React todo/planner app with bubble-based interactive UI
	- Add tasks through input at bottom
	- Click bubbles to expand and view details
	- Edit and delete functionality
	- Subtasks support
	- Mobile-responsive design

- [x] Scaffold the Project
	- Created Vite React TypeScript project structure
	- Executed npm create vite with react-ts template
	- Successfully installed all dependencies

- [x] Customize the Project
	- Implemented bubble-based task UI with interactive states
	- Created TaskBubble component with expand/collapse animations
	- Created TaskInput component with priority and due date selection
	- Added subtask management with checkboxes
	- Implemented edit mode for tasks
	- Priority-based color coding (high/medium/low)
	- Progress bars for subtask completion

- [x] Install Required Extensions
	- No extensions required for Vite React project

- [x] Compile the Project
	- Project dependencies installed successfully
	- No build errors
	- TypeScript configuration properly set up

- [x] Create and Run Task
	- Development server running at http://localhost:5173
	- Hot module reloading enabled
	- Ready for development

- [x] Launch the Project
	- Development server successfully started
	- Application accessible at http://localhost:5173

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
	- README.md created with comprehensive documentation
	- Project features, structure, and usage instructions included
	- Technology stack documented
	- Future enhancement ideas listed
